positive: A minimalist, high-contrast illustration of a whimsical cityscape at twilight. The scene features stylized geometric buildings interconnected by glowing ethereal bridges and suspended flora. The sky is a deep indigo gradient blending into a soft lavender horizon, providing a powerful backdrop for the clean, stylized silhouettes of the architecture. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a round neck t-shirt print. Use a vibrant, graphic color palette focusing on teal, gold, and violet. The style should be highly detailed vector art mixed with modern linework, giving a clean, comic book-inspired feel. Studio lighting, flat lay style, no perspective distortion, highly intricate.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, low resolution, cropped, text, signature, watermark, noisy, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grain, distortion, complex shading, logos
